task.title: Submitting a job from the Remote Systems or z/OS Projects view
task.shortdesc: You can submit a job from the Remote Systems or z/OS Projects view.

step.cmd: From the Remote Systems view or z/OS Projects view, expand the list of folders until you display the name of the JCL member of interest.
Right-click the JCL member and click Submit or press Ctrl+Alt+M.
step.stepresult: A job submission confirmation window opens.

step.cmd: To locate the job ID in the Remote Systems view, click Locate Job.
step.stepresult: The job ID is highlighted in the Retrieved Jobs filter of the JES subsystem.

step.cmd: To be notified when the job completes, click Notify.
step.stepresult: A JES job notify background job is created and displayed in the lower right corner of the workbench status bar as follows:Job Notification You can click the progress bar to open the job in the progress view. When the job completes a message is displayed in the lower left corner of the workbench status bar as follows:Job completion messageThe message is also written to the Remote Console.
